title: chore(deps): update dependency @testing-library/preact to v2

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>testing-library/preact-testing-library</summary>

### [`v2.0.1`](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/releases/v2.0.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/compare/v2.0.0...v2.0.1)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **types:** allow all elements ([4487694](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/commit/4487694c9c806ec76b4d8263110ed8509bbc84cc))

### [`v2.0.0`](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/releases/v2.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/compare/v1.0.2...v2.0.0)

##### Bug Fixes

-   api should be consistent with react-testing-library ([abd7621](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/commit/abd7621e8af0f1f7e1e2a7368c519a9291d705ad)), closes [#​24](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/issues/24)
-   drop node 8 support ([f14fd53](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/commit/f14fd53b8b8a69b67c67681009425e3460ccaa23))

##### Features

-   update [@​testing-library/dom](https://togithub.com/testing-library/dom) to latest ([931fff6](https://togithub.com/testing-library/preact-testing-library/commit/931fff620e7a35a78ae54b92f5fd5f19d3b9d600))

##### BREAKING CHANGES

-   upgrading [@​testing-library/dom](https://togithub.com/testing-library/dom) from 6.x to 7.x

</details>
